title: Analytics - Help Guide Opened
scenario: Help Guide page open event analytics data not updating in real-time in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Locate and tap on the Help Guide option (e.g., from the menu or settings).
Observe the Help Guide page loading.
Check the analytics logs for the event triggered when the Help Guide page is opened.

Verify that the analytics event includes the following data points: event graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
Wait a few hours and check if the event counts update accordingly.
expected: The Help Guide page opens successfully. The analytics event is logged with all required data points (event graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment). Event counts update after a few hours.
